meta.title: AiGen-One - AI Operations Portal | D'auchy.Studio
meta.description: An AI operations platform that turns spoken business needs into internal systems and distributes AI features through a managed company portal.

hero.eyebrow: FROM AI TOOLS TO AI OPERATIONS
hero.title:
From distributing AI tools
to distributing AI work.
hero.subtitle: Create business systems just by talking
hero.description: AiGen-One introduces ready-to-use AI workflows such as meeting minutes, proposal generation, internal document search, and multilingual chat through an internal portal. Employees do not need to learn AI tools first.
proofs: Turn frontline language into business systems
Manage permissions, logs, and updates centrally
hero.mockupLabel: Place AI work inside the portal

problem.title:
AI tools increased.
Work is still fragmented.
problem.description: ChatGPT, Gemini, NotebookLM, Claude, Copilot. AI tools are useful, but employees still switch tools, copy results, reorganize outputs, and share them manually.

items.title: Usage differs by employee
items.description: Prompts, settings, and useful workflows become personal know-how instead of shared company assets.

items.title: AI outputs still need manual return to work
items.description: Summaries and documents are faster, but people still move the results back into business systems.

items.title: Internal data and permissions stay disconnected
items.description: It is hard to manage who can see what and which files were used as references.

items.title: Teams keep relearning new AI features
items.description: Every model or product update creates another learning burden for the frontline.

values.title:
AiGen-One is a system to create,
distribute, and operate AI work.
values.description: AiGen-One is not a service that teaches people how to use AI. It is a system for creating, distributing, and operating AI-powered business functions across the company.

items.title: Create business systems by talking
items.description: When users describe their operational problem, AI asks for the right fields, permissions, and workflow, then converts it into screens and data structures.

items.title: Add AI functions as plugins
items.description: Meeting minutes, proposal generation, file RAG, multilingual chat, and other common AI workflows can be added to the portal.

items.title: Distribute, update, and govern as a company
items.description: Manage availability by department or role, usage logs, versions, prompts, and model updates from one place.

flow.title:
From frontline language
to working business systems.
flow.description: Users do not need requirement documents or system design skills. AiGen-One clarifies inputs, outputs, reference files, permissions, notifications, and AI assistance through conversation.

steps.title: Describe the business problem
steps.description: Move inquiries out of Excel, create proposals from meeting notes, search internal documents, or ask in natural business language.

steps.title: AI asks for the needed requirements
steps.description: Who will use it, what fields are needed, whether approvals or notifications exist, and which files should be referenced.

steps.title: Generate the system or AI feature
steps.description: Lists, forms, detail screens, search, summaries, document generation, and answer support are created for the workflow.

steps.title: Place it in the internal portal
steps.description: Generated functions appear in the AiGen-One work menu, so employees do not need to think about tool names or model names.

marketplace.title:
Common AI workflows
can be added as plugins.
marketplace.description: Not every user needs to build from scratch. Frequently used AI business functions can be installed from the marketplace and distributed internally by administrators.
marketplace.noteTitle: Start immediately with preset AI workflows
marketplace.note: Meeting minutes, proposal generation, file search, and multilingual chat can deliver value even before core database integration. Companies can create the first AI work entry point without modifying existing systems.

items.title: Meeting Minutes Plugin
items.description: Turns audio, transcripts, and notes into key points, decisions, tasks, owners, and deadlines.

items.title: Proposal from Notes
items.description: Creates customer issues, proposal direction, structure, and slide drafts from sales notes or interviews.

items.title: File Sharing RAG
items.description: Searches PDFs, Word, Excel, and PowerPoint files and answers with cited sources.

items.title: Multilingual Interpretation Chat
items.description: Helps members using different languages communicate naturally in chat.

items.title: Skills and Agents
items.description: Future marketplace support for AI agents that execute multi-step business processes.

architecture.title:
Not just an AI model.
A usable form for business.
architecture.description: AiGen-One combines models, prompts, RAG, file processing, screen generation, permissions, and logs into an operational AI layer for real work.

layers.title: Portal UI
layers.description: Unifies work menus, chat, and generated business screens in one entry point.

layers.title: App Generation
layers.description: Supports requirement interviews, screen design, data design, and workflow design.

layers.title: AI Runtime
layers.description: Controls LLM, RAG, summarization, translation, document generation, and agents by function.

layers.title: Data Layer
layers.description: Manages uploaded files, shared documents, business data, vector search, and source references.

layers.title: Admin Layer
layers.description: Manages users, permissions, plugins, usage logs, and versions.

useCases.title: AI workflows ready for each department.
useCases.description: Start small without waiting for core system integration, prove impact, then expand company-wide.

roadmap.title:
Start small,
then grow into an AI work foundation.
roadmap.description: Begin with AI workflows that do not require existing system changes, then expand into systemizing frontline work, portal operations, and agents.

phases.label: Phase 1
phases.title: Ready-to-use AI work plugins
phases.description: Deploy meeting minutes, proposal generation, file sharing RAG, and multilingual chat.

phases.label: Phase 2
phases.title: Systemize frontline work
phases.description: Create inquiry management, daily reports, task management, and checklists through conversation.

phases.label: Phase 3
phases.title: Internal portal operations
phases.description: Organize generated systems and plugins by department and role.

phases.label: Phase 4
phases.title: Agent workflows
phases.description: Add AI agents that execute multi-step work instead of single AI functions only.

phases.label: Phase 5
phases.title: External marketplace
phases.description: Expand into a marketplace where partners and developers can publish plugins and agents.

governance.title:
Designed not only to be useful,
but to be governable.
governance.description: Business AI must show who accessed what, what was generated, and which function was used. AiGen-One is designed so companies can manage AI usage as an operating system.

items.title: AI cannot see what users cannot see
items.description: Control accessible files and functions by department, role, and user.

items.title: Manage sources by function
items.description: Configure which files RAG can reference and how evidence appears for each business function.

items.title: Track usage logs
items.description: Administrators can see who used which feature and which information was referenced.

items.title: Version plugins
items.description: Update prompts, model settings, screens, and processing logic centrally.

pricing.title: Pricing Plans
pricing.description: AiGen-One offers a flexible pricing model so each organization can choose only the functions needed by app users, AI users, app builders, and administrators.

plans.features: Business menu access, use of production apps, input, search, edit, and review

plans.target: Staff who research or consult with AI
plans.features: Business User features, AiGen-One Chat, general LLM chat, internal knowledge search, business data Q&A, operation guidance, MCP Access

plans.target: People who create and improve business apps
plans.features: AI User features, app generation, app improvement from existing apps, preview, chat refinement, sharing requests
AI User features, app generation, staff management, permission management, usage limit management, sharing approval, business menu management
Organization management, DB connection, external integrations, Git / API / MCP / OAuth management, production release, plugin management, security, audit logs

pricing.aiUserDescription: AiGen-One Chat is a business AI that supports writing, summarization, and consultation as a general LLM chat, plus internal knowledge search, business data Q&A, operation guidance, and app generation support. With MCP Access, teams can also use AiGen-One internal knowledge, business data, and app generation safely from MCP-compatible LLM chats such as Claude and Codex.
pricing.aiUserQuote: Keep using familiar AI tools. Connect business data and internal knowledge safely through AiGen-One.
notes: Keep costs low for staff who only use business apps.
Add AI usage, app generation, organization management, and plugins only where needed.
In smaller organizations, organization admins can also handle app generation.
In larger organizations, Workspace Users and Organization Admins can be separated for safer development, approval, and operation.

cta.title:
Before adding more AI tools,
embed AI into work.
cta.description: AiGen-One creates business systems from frontline language, distributes AI functions internally, and turns AI progress into operational value.
